steps.title: Identify the benefit-then-challenge structure
steps.content: The passage introduces customized products as a growing trend, then explains why companies benefit (consumers pay more and wait longer) before using Still to signal a pivot to the core challenge: keeping costs low with customization. This benefit-then-challenge pattern defines the text's structure.

steps.title: Match to the correct choice
steps.content: Choice C correctly captures this structure: the passage introduces the trend, then explains both its benefits to companies and the challenge it creates. A claims manufacturing innovations are discussed (they aren't), B frames this as a success story with causal factors (wrong pattern), and D mistakenly describes contrasting techniques (the passage presents one approach, not contrasted methods). That matches choice C — C is correct.
